---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a small feature or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

> **Note:** larger architectural changes go through the RFC process — open an issue with the **RFC** template instead.

## Problem

What user-visible problem is this feature solving?

## Proposed solution

One or two paragraphs.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about? Why is the proposal better?

## Spec mapping

Does this satisfy or extend a requirement in `../../docs/SPECIFICATION.md`?

## Out of scope

Explicitly call out related ideas you are NOT proposing here.
